The '''Montrosa Islands''' were a long chain of islands located in the middle of [[Montrosa Ocean]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reytha]]. The islands were too small to be of any agricultural use, and were too remote to be of any interest to colonizers, which made them ideal for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] airbases and [[Shipyard (water)|shipyards]].<ref name="GB" />

The presence of an Rebel force in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] necessitated an [[Reytha campaign|incursion]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] forces led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to destroy them.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Montrosa Islands first appeared during the Darth Vader campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.<ref name="GB" /> The campaign was also included in the [[2002]] game expansion [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
